A

AbstractCheckoutContractTest - Class in academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.test
Abstract JUnit 5 contract for checkout strategy implementations.
AbstractCheckoutContractTest() - Constructor for class academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.test.AbstractCheckoutContractTest
Creates the abstract contract test instance.
academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain - package academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain
Immutable checkout domain types used by the pricing and shipping task.
academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.service - package academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.service
Service contracts used to create checkout strategies and calculate totals.
academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.strategy.discount - package academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.strategy.discount
Discount strategies that reduce checkout subtotal in different ways.
academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.strategy.shipping - package academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.strategy.shipping
Shipping strategies that determine delivery cost for a checkout.
academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.test - package academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.test
Abstract JUnit 5 contract tests that student implementations must satisfy.

C

calculate(CheckoutContext, DiscountStrategy, ShippingStrategy) - Method in interface academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.service.CheckoutCalculator
Calculates the complete checkout result.
calculateDiscount(CheckoutContext) - Method in interface academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.strategy.discount.DiscountStrategy
Calculates the raw discount for the supplied checkout context.
calculateShipping(CheckoutContext) - Method in interface academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.strategy.shipping.ShippingStrategy
Calculates shipping cost for the supplied checkout context.
CheckoutCalculator - Interface in academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.service
Combines discount and shipping strategies to calculate the final checkout total.
CheckoutComponentFactory - Interface in academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.service
Creates discount and shipping strategies used by the checkout contract tests.
CheckoutContext - Class in academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain
Immutable checkout input that is passed to pricing and shipping strategies.
CheckoutContext(List<OrderItem>, CustomerProfile) - Constructor for class academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain.CheckoutContext
Creates a checkout context from ordered items and one customer profile.
createCheckoutCalculator() - Method in class academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.test.AbstractCheckoutContractTest
Creates a checkout calculator implementation for the tests.
createCheckoutComponentFactory() - Method in class academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.test.AbstractCheckoutContractTest
Creates a factory capable of building all discount and shipping strategies used in the tests.
createFlatRateShippingStrategy(BigDecimal) - Method in interface academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.service.CheckoutComponentFactory
Creates a shipping strategy that always charges the same amount.
createFreeShippingOverThresholdStrategy(BigDecimal, BigDecimal) - Method in interface academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.service.CheckoutComponentFactory
Creates a shipping strategy that becomes free when subtotal reaches a threshold.
createNoDiscountStrategy() - Method in interface academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.service.CheckoutComponentFactory
Creates a strategy that never applies a discount.
createPercentageDiscountStrategy(BigDecimal) - Method in interface academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.service.CheckoutComponentFactory
Creates a percentage-based discount strategy.
createPerItemShippingStrategy(BigDecimal) - Method in interface academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.service.CheckoutComponentFactory
Creates a shipping strategy that multiplies the rate by the total item quantity.
createThresholdDiscountStrategy(BigDecimal, BigDecimal) - Method in interface academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.service.CheckoutComponentFactory
Creates a fixed discount that applies only when subtotal reaches a threshold.
CustomerProfile - Class in academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain
Immutable customer information used by checkout rules.
CustomerProfile(String, boolean, String) - Constructor for class academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain.CustomerProfile
Creates a customer profile.

D

DiscountStrategy - Interface in academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.strategy.discount
Calculates a discount for the current checkout context.

E

equals(Object) - Method in class academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain.CustomerProfile
 
equals(Object) - Method in class academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain.OrderItem
 
equals(Object) - Method in class academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain.PriceBreakdown
 

G

getCode() - Method in interface academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.strategy.discount.DiscountStrategy
Returns a stable code describing this discount strategy.
getCode() - Method in interface academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.strategy.shipping.ShippingStrategy
Returns a stable code describing this shipping strategy.
getCustomerId() - Method in class academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain.CustomerProfile
Returns the customer identifier.
getCustomerProfile() - Method in class academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain.CheckoutContext
Returns the customer profile.
getDiscountAmount() - Method in class academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain.PriceBreakdown
Returns the effective discount applied to the order.
getFinalTotal() - Method in class academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain.PriceBreakdown
Returns the final amount payable by the customer.
getItems() - Method in class academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain.CheckoutContext
Returns an immutable ordered item list.
getItemsSubtotal() - Method in class academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain.CheckoutContext
Returns the subtotal of all order lines before discount and shipping.
getLineSubtotal() - Method in class academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain.OrderItem
Returns the subtotal for this single line.
getName() - Method in class academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain.OrderItem
Returns the human readable item name.
getQuantity() - Method in class academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain.OrderItem
Returns how many units were ordered.
getRegion() - Method in class academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain.CustomerProfile
Returns the delivery region.
getShippingCost() - Method in class academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain.PriceBreakdown
Returns the shipping cost charged for the order.
getSku() - Method in class academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain.OrderItem
Returns the item identifier.
getSubtotal() - Method in class academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain.PriceBreakdown
Returns the original subtotal before adjustments.
getTotalItemCount() - Method in class academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain.CheckoutContext
Returns the total quantity of all ordered units.
getUnitPrice() - Method in class academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain.OrderItem
Returns the price of one unit.

I

isLoyaltyMember() - Method in class academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain.CustomerProfile
Indicates whether the customer belongs to the loyalty program.

O

OrderItem - Class in academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain
Immutable line item used during checkout.

P

PriceBreakdown - Class in academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain
Immutable calculation result for a completed checkout.
PriceBreakdown(BigDecimal, BigDecimal, BigDecimal, BigDecimal) - Constructor for class academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.domain.PriceBreakdown
Creates a new checkout result.
